TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tomay tata'angay kora tomay O ta'angayay, micococay 'a'adopen a "LEY" ko tomay, o komaenay to titi a "MO". Ira ko tata'akay a tatirengan, cicediay a kamay ato oo', kakaya'ay a ngoso', kifetolay cifanohay a fanges, kamoko'ay a wikor. O kamay ato oo' no tomay i, ira ko ma'ikongay macidemay a kanoos, caay karecad to no posi a manga'ay a mahimed i kamay. O Pey-Ci-Syong hanany a tomay i, o komaenay to titi, nikaorira, ira ko komaenay to aol a tomay, o Ta-Maw-Syong hananay. O roma a tomay i, komaenay to maamaan, caay kapipili'.
S.PHON: to~umaj tataʡaŋaj ko~ura to~umaj o~u taʡaŋajaj, miʦo~uʦo~uʦaj ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən a "ɾəj" ko~u to~umaj, o~u ko~umaənaj to~u titi a "mo~u". ira ko~u tataʡakaj a tatirəŋan, ʦiʦəɬ~ɮiaj a kamaj ato~u o~uo~uʡ, kakajaʡaj a ŋo~uso~uʡ, kifəto~uɾaj ʦifano~uħaj a faŋəs, kamo~uko~uʡaj a wiko~ur. o~u kamaj ato~u o~uo~uʡ no~u to~umaj i, ira ko~u maʡiko~uŋaj maʦiɬ~ɮəmaj a kano~uo~us, ʦaaj karəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u po~usi a maŋaʡaj a maħiməɬ~ɮ i kamaj. o~u pəj-ʦi-sjo~uŋ ħananj a to~umaj i, o~u ko~umaənaj to~u titi, nikao~urira, ira ko~u ko~umaənaj to~u ao~uɾ a to~umaj, o~u ta-maw-sjo~uŋ ħananaj. o~u ro~uma a to~umaj i, ko~umaənaj to~u maamaan, ʦaaj kapipiɾiʡ.
S.FORM: tomay tata'angay kora tomay O ta'angayay, micococay 'a'adopen a "LEY" ko tomay, o komaenay to titi a "MO". Ira ko tata'akay a tatirengan, cicediay a kamay ato oo', kakaya'ay a ngoso', kifetolay cifanohay a fanges, kamoko'ay a wikor. O kamay ato oo' no tomay i, ira ko ma'ikongay macidemay a kanoos, caay karecad to no posi a manga'ay a mahimed i kamay. O Pey-Ci-Syong hanany a tomay i, o komaenay to titi, nikaorira, ira ko komaenay to aol a tomay, o Ta-Maw-Syong hananay. O roma a tomay i, komaenay to maamaan, caay kapipili'.
S.PHON: to~umaj tataʡaŋaj ko~ura to~umaj o~u taʡaŋajaj, miʦo~uʦo~uʦaj ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən a "ɾəj" ko~u to~umaj, o~u ko~umaənaj to~u titi a "mo~u". ira ko~u tataʡakaj a tatirəŋan, ʦiʦəɬ~ɮiaj a kamaj ato~u o~uo~uʡ, kakajaʡaj a ŋo~uso~uʡ, kifəto~uɾaj ʦifano~uħaj a faŋəs, kamo~uko~uʡaj a wiko~ur. o~u kamaj ato~u o~uo~uʡ no~u to~umaj i, ira ko~u maʡiko~uŋaj maʦiɬ~ɮəmaj a kano~uo~us, ʦaaj karəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u po~usi a maŋaʡaj a maħiməɬ~ɮ i kamaj. o~u pəj-ʦi-sjo~uŋ ħananj a to~umaj i, o~u ko~umaənaj to~u titi, nikao~urira, ira ko~u ko~umaənaj to~u ao~uɾ a to~umaj, o~u ta-maw-sjo~uŋ ħananaj. o~u ro~uma a to~umaj i, ko~umaənaj to~u maamaan, ʦaaj kapipiɾiʡ.
